parameters.query:
-- Find existing subscriber, create profile if needed
WITH subscriber AS (
  INSERT INTO email_subscribers (email, full_name, source, status)
  VALUES ('{{ $json.customer_email }}', '{{ $json.customer_name }}', 'purchase', 'active')
  ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET has_purchased = TRUE, updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),
profile AS (
  INSERT INTO profiles (email, full_name, stripe_customer_id)
  VALUES ('{{ $json.customer_email }}', '{{ $json.customer_name }}', '{{ $json.stripe_customer_id }}')
  ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET stripe_customer_id = '{{ $json.stripe_customer_id }}', updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT subscriber.id AS subscriber_id, profile.id AS profile_id
FROM subscriber, profile;

SELECT id, name, price_cents, product_type, affiliate_commission_pct
FROM digital_products
WHERE id = '{{ $json.metadata.product_id }}' OR stripe_price_id = '{{ $json.metadata.price_id }}'
LIMIT 1

UPDATE purchase_items
SET access_granted = TRUE, access_granted_at = NOW()
WHERE purchase_id = '{{ $json.id }}';

-- Update purchase_items with download URLs from the product
UPDATE purchase_items pi
SET download_url = dp.file_urls->0->>'url'
FROM digital_products dp
WHERE pi.product_id = dp.id AND pi.purchase_id = '{{ $json.id }}';
